name: NanoPlot (Long-read QC)
description: Quality control of long reads (Oxford Nanopore / PacBio) with NanoPlot

inputs.name: Linked long-read FASTQ files
inputs.description: Long-read FASTQ files linked to order samples (single-end ONT/PacBio)
inputs.sourceDescription: Read records linked to the selected sequencing order

outputs.name: NanoPlot HTML report
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as a run artifact for review and preview

outputs.name: NanoStats text
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as a run artifact for download

outputs.name: Summary TSV
outputs.description: Combined long-read statistics across all samples
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as a run artifact for download

steps.name: Run NanoPlot
steps.description: Run NanoPlot on each sample's long reads to compute QC metrics and an HTML report

steps.name: Collect statistics
steps.description: Merge per-sample NanoStats into a single summary table
